item.title: BPS states and wall-crossing
item.description: Introduction to BPS states and the Kontsevich–Soibelman wall-crossing formula.

item.title: about
item.description:
who is meowsicist?

Physics graduate working at the intersection of theoretical physics and quantum computing. Currently pursuing research opportunities in string theory, lattice QFT, and quantum algorithms.

interests

  • quantum computing — FPGA acceleration, VQE, QAOA, error mitigation
  • theoretical physics — lattice QFT, gauge theories, AdS/CFT, string theory
  • mathematics — analysis, topology, Lie groups, algebraic geometry
$$|\text{meowsicist}\rangle = \alpha\,|\text{physics}\rangle + \beta\,|\text{math}\rangle + \gamma\,|\text{qc}\rangle$$
